title: Did Anno turn Eva into RahXephon
display_title: Did Anno turn Eva into RahXephon
wikitext:
[]: Did Anno turn Eva into RahXephon?             Quote Post by Ark » Mon Nov 29, 2021 12:22 pm I haven't got round to watching 3.0+1.0 yet, but I've listened to plenty of commentary about it and know pretty much how the plot unfolds. I have to say, it sounds a lot like the end of RahXephon. Is it? RahXephon was always stereotypically presented as the best Eva clone. A lot of people even used to say it was an improvement on Eva, but you don't really hear that now. To me there were certain things that made the two very distinct. Even thinking about the Rebuild films I've already seen, they're much closer to RahXephon than the original series ever was.

[]: Re: Did Anno turn Eva into RahXephon?             Quote Post by sithsauron » Mon Nov 29, 2021 4:09 pm I'm just gonna say with the time-skip added to the Eva storyline, this statement is Hilarious.

[]: Re: Did Anno turn Eva into RahXephon?             Quote Post by Zoop » Tue Nov 30, 2021 3:44 am Just the bit where they turned instrumentality into a tuning between 2 mecha's. That seriously gave me RahXephon vibes, I literally went out loud "hah, has that come full circle". But the comparison ends there, imo. Storytelling, worldbuilding, action, background etc, aren't even close.

[]: Re: Did Anno turn Eva into RahXephon?             Quote Post by Ark » Tue Nov 30, 2021 4:50 am Zoop wrote: Just the bit where they turned instrumentality into a tuning between 2 mecha's.

[]: Re: Did Anno turn Eva into RahXephon?             Quote Post by Zoop » Tue Nov 30, 2021 7:06 am I'm referring to one of the gendo's things said (tho this could just be weird subbing), I dont remember the exact text, but it was something about cassius and longinus, hope and despair, 01 and 13, tuning towards eachother. Tuning the world? Something like that at least. All that was missing was the two mecha's starting to sing :p

[]: Re: Did Anno turn Eva into RahXephon?             Quote Post by Szmitten » Tue Nov 30, 2021 9:04 am Ark wrote: I haven't got round to watching 3.0+1.0 yet, but

[]: Re: Did Anno turn Eva into RahXephon?             Quote Post by pathstrider » Wed Dec 01, 2021 5:45 pm As another person says, you should see it yourself. But now you’ve put it like that, yeah I’d say 3.0+1 closer to raxhephon. Ymmv as to whether that’s a good thing or not.

[]: Re: Did Anno turn Eva into RahXephon?             Quote Post by pwhodges » Wed Dec 01, 2021 7:19 pm Closer? Maybe - but it's not as though they have a lot in common even so.

[]: Re: Did Anno turn Eva into RahXephon?             Quote Post by Registration2 » Mon Dec 06, 2021 7:25 pm It already had funny intersections like the character designer doing the manga adaptation (In case of Rah, it wasn't the character designer but Buchi's second choice for the CD) https://animetics.files.wordpress.com/2 ... phon-2.jpg The funniest thing is that those designs or at least the origin of them were intended to be used in Brain Powerd, but when it was decided that Nagano would make the designs, izubuchi used the designs for his debut in Rah. So it all somehow ties to Tomino. But yeah, eva went full rah (and I do think rah is way better than evangelion in the plot/lore/characters) since it is intended to be mysterious, different from the more sloppy evangelion in this regard.
